name: brave-search
description: Search the web using the Brave Search API. Provides fast, privacy-focused web search with configurable result limits. Requires a Brave Search API key.
commands: search <query>                                — Search the web with a query
search <query> --country <code>               — Country-specific results (e.g., US, DE, GB)

apiKey.description: Brave Search API key. Get one from https://brave.com/search/api/

maxResults.description: Default maximum number of results (1-20). Default: 5
